Marriage is a beautiful blending of two hearts, two souls.
This joining together is the ultimate intimacy that two human beings can share.
It is an estate not to be entered into lightly, but rather to be approached reverently, sincerely, and with the deepest humility.
Love is friendship that has caught fire, sustained by giving yourselves to this sacred union.
And as you grow together, remember to sow and reap love with gratitude.
For each act of kindness, each tender smile, is a seed that will blossom forth to fill all of your tomorrows with peace, love, and harmony.
A man who truly understood love once said,
Love is patient, love is kind, and envies no one.
Love is never boastful, nor conceited, nor rude, never selfish, nor quick to take offense.
Love keeps no score of wrongs, does not gloat over others' errors, but delights in the truth.
There is nothing that love cannot face.
There is no limit to its faith, its hope, and its endurance.
Through these qualities of love, your knowledge and understanding of each other will deepen the bond between you.
Deep knowledge of one another is not something that can be achieved in a short time,
and real understanding of the other's feelings can develop fully only with years of intimacy.
It grows out of a deep caring to share your innermost selves,
to be open and vulnerable and supportive of each other,
not only in your joys and sorrows, but also in your successes.
Recognize that the events that fill your days,
though they may appear to be struggles and infirmities,
are but guideposts assisting each of you into love's deepest ways.
To know each other in this way is a priceless gift.
Give yourselves in love, but do not give yourselves away.
Khalil Gibran echoes these sentiments in *The Prophet* when he said,
Love one another, but make not a bond of love.
Let it rather be a moving sea between the shores of your souls.
Fill each other's cup, but drink not from the same cup.
Give one another of your bread, but eat not from the same loaf.
Sing and dance together, yet let each of you be alone,
though they quiver with the same music.
Thus it is out of the resonance between individuality and union
that love, whose incredible strength is born and reborn through all the years of your lives.
It is going to be a wonderful life for both of you standing side by side.
The future for you both is now ahead.
The past is gone, and today is the beginning of your tomorrow.
So your faith in each other must be flawless,
and your love for each other well with understanding and compassion.
